title: Why did Akaash Singh leave Flagrant? Andrew Schulz confirms heartbreaking podcast exit after nine years
summary_full: Andrew Schulz announced Akaash Singh is leaving the Flagrant podcast after nearly a decade together. Singh is stepping away to fully focus on his growing stand-up comedy career and ongoing “Generational Triumph” tour after major performances, including a sold-out Radio City Music Hall show in New York.
